instruction:
The volume of the largest cone that can be inscribed in a sphere of radius = $9$ cm is

Options:
A. \dfrac{128}{3}\pi c.c
B. $$288\pi c.c$$
C. \dfrac{144}{3}\pi c.c
D. $$\dfrac{288}{3}\pi c.c$$
E. \dfrac{64}{3}\pi c.c
F. $$\dfrac{32}{3}\pi c.c$$
G. \dfrac{96}{3}\pi c.c
H. \dfrac{16}{3}\pi c.c
I. \dfrac{256}{3}\pi c.c
J. $$72\pi c.c$$
